title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NHB - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NHB - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at NHB are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
